_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in generating queries and reports.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in translating a business question into a data query, identifying the correct data sources, joins, filters, and aggregations required to answer the question accurately.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI AB domain. AB-S-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-S-002 (TF, cosine: 0.594), TF-S-010 (TF, cosine: 0.594).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.2/10 (raw 0.619). Shared vocabulary: [skill]. DCWF-only terms [generating, queries, reports] vs WIDAI-only terms [accurately, aggregations, answer, business, correct, data] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.880 (P=0.907, R=0.855). P exceeds R by 0.052 — the DCWF element's 6 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 25 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Skill in generating queries and reports." and "Skill in translating a business question into a data query, identifying the corr" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.605 ≈ STS 0.619 (gap 0.014). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [skill] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.5%. Shared tokens: [skill]. DCWF-only: [generating, queries, reports]. WIDAI-only: [accurately, aggregations, answer, business, correct, data].
